introSection:
All Speeds (Simplified Chinese: 极速狂飙) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Sunac Land Chengdu in Dujiangyan, Chengdu, Sichuan, China.

The Chinese name translates to "Extremely Fast Hurricane".

sections.title: Design
sections.content: All Speeds is a clone of Taron at Phantasialand.

fullText:
All Speeds (Simplified Chinese: 极速狂飙) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Sunac Land Chengdu in Dujiangyan, Chengdu, Sichuan, China.

The Chinese name translates to "Extremely Fast Hurricane".

All Speeds is a clone of Taron at Phantasialand.
